summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Lost Atelier premium editorial landing page. All sections render correctly with premium design, animations, and responsive functionality working as specified.
passed_tests: Hero section with wine barrels background and 'LOST ATELIER' title
Diagnosis section with 'El Problema' content about brand communication
Value proposition 'Artesanía con Alma' with 5 checklist items
Methodology section with 3 phases (Inmersión, Construcción, Estrategia Internacional)
Contact section with 2 functional email CTA buttons
Framer Motion scroll animations triggering properly
Mobile responsive design across all sections
Fast load times (1ms DOM content loaded, 3 images total)
Clean console with no JavaScript errors
